nasb.text: But I know your sitting down And your going out and your coming in And your raging against Me.

esv.text: “‘I know your sitting down and your going out and coming in, and your raging against me.

cnv.text: 你坐下， 你出，你入， 你向我發烈怒，我都知道。

ccb.text: “‘你起你坐，你出你进， 你向我发怒，我都知道。

csbs.text: 你或坐或出或入，我都知道； 我也知道你对我发怒。
